description: Validate reconnect gap handling and replay compensation path under flaky-link cursor discontinuity.
command: cargo test -p alan daemon::routes::tests::read_events_returns_buffered_envelopes_with_cursor_and_gap_flag -- --exact && cargo test -p alan daemon::routes::tests::reconnect_snapshot_degrades_gracefully_when_run_snapshot_missing -- --exact
assertions: events/read reports gap=true when cursor is invalid or evicted
reconnect snapshot still returns replay metadata when run snapshot is unavailable
recovery path remains deterministic without implicit execution retry
